message.content:
@startuml
title AI takes a turn

actor Controller
participant ":AIController" as AIC {
}

activate AIC #LightYellow 
AIC ->> AIC : Step() 

loop [for all Robot r in robots]  
    activate AIC  #LightGreen   
        note right of AIC: HandleRobot(r)    
end loop  

deactivate AIC   

loop [for all TeleportGate t in teleporters ]     
     activate AIC   #Pink      
         note left of AIC:HandleTeleportGate(t )       
 end loop    

 deactivate AIC     

 loop[ for all UFO u in ufosses]:        
      activat e(AI C)#OrangeRed          
           not es rig ht o f(AlC):Hand leUF O(u);         
 en dlo op;         


@end um l
